name: site-media-checker
description: Website media metadata validator for favicons, app icons, manifests and social previews.

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm --workspace packages/core run build
scripts.check:web: npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace apps/web run test
scripts.check:core: npm --workspace packages/core run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/core run test
scripts.test: npm --workspace packages/core run test && npm run test:api
scripts.check:api: cd apps/api && deno check main.ts dev.ts
scripts.check: npm run check:web && npm run check:core && npm run lint:api && npm run check:api && npm run test:api
